CREATE TABLE Demo.demo.Shippers (ID INT PRIMARY KEY, Name VARCHAR(100), Address VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO Demo.demo.Shippers (ID, Name, Address) VALUES (1, 'Shipper A', 'Address A');
INSERT INTO Demo.demo.Shippers (ID, Name, Address) VALUES (2, 'Shipper B', 'Address B');
CREATE TABLE Demo.demo.Customers (ID INT PRIMARY KEY, ShipperID INT, FOREIGN KEY (ShipperID) REFERENCES Demo.demo.Shippers(ID));
SELECT * FROM Demo.demo.Shippers WHERE ID IN (SELECT ShipperID FROM Demo.demo.Customers WHERE ID = 1);
DB.DBA.REPL_CREATE_SNAPSHOT_PUB ('(SELECT * FROM Demo.demo.Shippers WHERE Name LIKE ''%A%'')', 2);
